This line has a comma, right here.
This line has "double quotes" in it.
This line has 'single quotes' in it.
This line has both, "commas and quotes", together.
This line has a "quoted, comma inside" the quotes.
This line ends with a comma,
This line has an = sign which triggers CSV injection in some tools.
+also this one with plus.
@and this one with at.
Last line.
